name: Hartford Great Health Corp.
summary: Hartford Great Health Corp., through its subsidiaries, provides hospitality services. It operates through Hospitality and Education segments. The company provides hotel and travel agency services. It also offers early childhood education services, such as parent-child and bilingual childcare classes. The company was formerly known as PhotoAmigo, Inc. and changed its name to Hartford Great Health Corp. in August 2018. Hartford Great Health Corp. was founded in 2008 and is based in Rosemead, California.
